name: Baseline
description: Initial baseline with ISNA hardcoded for all regions
notes: Ground truth from Aladhan API with correct regional methods. High WMAE driven by wrong method selection (ISNA for all) and eval day-rollover bug.

name: Regional method auto-selection
description: Auto-detect country from coordinates, select correct calculation method
changes: Country-to-method mapping: Morocco→18°/17°, Saudi→UmmAlQura, Turkey→Diyanet, Egypt→Egyptian, UK→MoonsightingCommittee, Malaysia→JAKIM, USA→ISNA
notes: Fajr improved significantly. Isha still dominated by eval day-rollover bug and high-latitude edge cases.

name: Fajr calibration and method refinement
description: Improved Fajr accuracy, London Isha fix with MoonsightingCommittee
notes: Incremental improvements. Main WMAE unchanged due to Isha domination.

name: High-latitude Isha fix + eval day-rollover bug
description: Fixed post-midnight Isha parsing in eval, Norway MiddleOfTheNight rule, Finland bounding box fix
changes: 1) eval.js: post-midnight Isha day-rollover fix. 2) engine.js: Norway→MiddleOfTheNight, Finland bounding box priority fix
notes: Major breakthrough. WMAE dropped 89% from 21.39 to 2.31 min. Now approaching Young (2006) ±2 min atmospheric floor.
